name: Teriyaki Beef Kebabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice meat into 3-inch strips, 1/8-inch thick.
2. Mix all ingredients for the sauce, except brown sugar and cornstarch, in a bowl.
3. Marinate beef strips in the sauce for 3 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Drain the marinated beef strips, reserving the sauce.
5. Weave the beef strips back and forth on skewers.
6. Brush the skewers with the reserved sauce.
7. Preheat the grill.
8. Arrange the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
9. In a saucepan, stir brown sugar and cornstarch into the remaining sauce; bring to boil, stirring constantly until thickened.
10. Serve the thickened sauce over the skewers on a bed of rice.
